message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "user" as User
participant "runtime" as Runtime
participant "ibex" as Ibex
participant "ibex.sklearn" as IbexSklearn
participant "loader" as Loader
participant "sklearn.linear_model" as SklearnLinearModel

User -> Runtime: 1 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
activate Runtime
Runtime -> Ibex: 2 import ibex
activate Ibex
Ibex -> IbexSklearn: 3 import ibex.sklearn
activate IbexSklearn
IbexSklearn -[loop]- : register sys.metapath
IbexSklearn --> IbexSklearn
deactivate IbexSklearn
deactivate Ibex
Runtime -> Loader: 5 import ibex.sklearn.linear_model
activate Loader
Loader -> SklearnLinearModel: 6 dir
activate SklearnLinearModel
SklearnLinearModel --> Loader: 7 members
deactivate SklearnLinearModel
Loader -[loop]- : inspect
Loader --> Loader
Loader -[loop]- : wrap
Loader --> Loader
deactivate Loader
deactivate Runtime

@enduml
```
